title: Ocean Revamp
description: New ocean biomes to improve your aquatic journeys in vanilla
body:
![The title "Ocean Revamp" overlayed on top of dripstone ocean picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2dbrryRr/images/f045cf31213582cdf403d5567354963ce74fc4a1.jpeg)

## 📖 About
This datapack/mod adds an additional 3 new biomes in to the ocean to refresh the vanilla experience. It is likely to be incompatible with most other terrain generation mods/datapacks so beware!

## 🌊 Biome List
### Ocean Biomes:
1. Volcanic
2. Forest
3. Dripstone

## 🔍 FAQ
### How do I find the biomes?
The non cheaty way is to explore the world, each biome has different probabilities and locations according to temperature and ocean depth! If you're still struggling you can:
1. Use the **```/locate biome ocean:<name_of_biome>```** to find either your desired structure

2. Alternatively, you can get your **```/seed```** and **upload the datapack file** to the [Minecraft Datapack Map website](https://map.jacobsjo.eu/) and search through it like a regular seed map
### Will the datapack/mod be backported?
Currently I have no plans to backport the datapack or mod, but I will keep adding new biomes and structures in the planned section as currently the project is in beta!
